events.label: assistant
events.text:
Assessment complete — written to `/app/answer.json`.

**Decision: fail (high risk)**. Double-tapped breakers not listed for two conductors violate NEC 408.41 (and manufacturer listing requirements via 110.3(B)), creating a real overheating/arc/fire risk from loose or improperly-bearing terminations. Since the panel is only rough-complete, the fix (remove double-taps, install listed twin breakers or split circuits, re-terminate to torque spec, reinspect for 110.26 clearance and 200.4 conductor identification) must happen before cover-on and energization.
